# Psalms 37

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

## Verses (40)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Do not be angry because of the wrongdoers, or have envy of the workers of evil. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | For they will quickly be cut down like grass, and become dry like the green plants. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Have faith in the Lord, and do good; be at rest in the land, and go after righteousness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | So will your delight be in the Lord, and he will give you your heart's desires. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Put your life in the hands of the Lord; have faith in him and he will do it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | And he will make your righteousness be seen like the light, and your cause like the shining of the sun. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Take your rest in the Lord, waiting quietly for him; do not be angry because of the man who does well in his evil ways, and gives effect to his bad designs. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Put an end to your wrath and be no longer bitter; do not give way to angry feeling which is a cause of sin. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | For the evil-doers will be cut off: but those who have faith in the Lord will have the earth for their heritage. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | For in a short time the evil-doer will be gone: you will go searching for his place, and it will not be there. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | But the gentle will have the earth for their heritage; they will take their delight in peace without measure. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | The sinner has evil designs against the upright, lifting up the voice of wrath against him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | He will be laughed at by the Lord, who sees that his day is coming. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | The evil-doers have taken out their swords, their bows are bent; for crushing the poor, and to put to death those who are upright in their ways. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | But their swords will be turned into their hearts, and their bows will be broken. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | The little which the good man has is better than the wealth of evil-doers. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | For the arms of the evil-doers will be broken: but the Lord is the support of the good. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | The days of the upright are numbered by the Lord, and their heritage will be for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | They will not be shamed in the evil time, and in the days when all are in need of food they will have enough. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | But the wrongdoers will come to destruction, and the haters of the Lord will be like the fat of lambs, they will be burned up; they will go up in smoke, and never again be seen. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | The sinner takes money and does not give it back; but the upright man has mercy, and gives to others. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Those who have his blessing will have the earth for their heritage; but those who are cursed by him will be cut off. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | The steps of a good man are ordered by the Lord, and he takes delight in his way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | Even if he has a fall he will not be without help: for the hand of the Lord is supporting him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | I have been young, and now am old, but I have not seen the good man without help, or his children looking for bread. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | All the day he is ready to have mercy and to give; his children are a blessing. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | Be turned from evil, and do good; and your place will be for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | For the Lord is a lover of righteousness, and takes care of his saints; they will be kept safe for ever; but the seed of the evil-doers will be cut off. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | The upright will have the earth for their heritage, and will go on living there for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | The mouth of the good man says words of wisdom; the talk of his tongue is of righteousness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | The law of his God is in his heart; he will never make a false step. | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | The sinners are watching the upright man, desiring to put him to death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | The Lord will not give him into their hands, or be against him when he is judged. | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | Be waiting for the Lord, and keep his way; and you will be lifted up, and have the land for your heritage: when the evil-doers are cut off, you will see it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | I have seen the evil-doer in great power, covering the earth like a great tree. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
| [36](BBE.md#v36) | But he came to an end, and there was no sign of him; I made a search for him and he was not there. | [WEB](WEB.md#v36) · [KJV](KJV.md#v36) · [ASV](ASV.md#v36) |
| [37](BBE.md#v37) | Give attention to the good man, and take note of the upright; because the end of that man is peace. | [WEB](WEB.md#v37) · [KJV](KJV.md#v37) · [ASV](ASV.md#v37) |
| [38](BBE.md#v38) | But as for the sinners, they will be cut off together; the end of the wrongdoers is destruction. | [WEB](WEB.md#v38) · [KJV](KJV.md#v38) · [ASV](ASV.md#v38) |
| [39](BBE.md#v39) | But the Lord is the saviour of the upright: he is their strength in the time of trouble. | [WEB](WEB.md#v39) · [KJV](KJV.md#v39) · [ASV](ASV.md#v39) |
| [40](BBE.md#v40) | And the Lord will be their help, and keep them safe: he will take them out of the hands of the evil-doers, and be their saviour, because they had faith in him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v40) · [KJV](KJV.md#v40) · [ASV](ASV.md#v40) |
